zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Ely Sr.於1635年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德時，他的父親Nathaniel Ely Jr30歲，母親Susanna Martha Tuffnell27歲。他於1659年10月28日與Mary Day在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1692年3月17日在他的家鄉享年57歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Ely Sr.于1635年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德时，他的父亲Nathaniel Ely Jr30岁，母亲Susanna Martha Tuffnell27岁。他于1659年10月28日与Mary Day在美国马萨诸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1692年3月17日在他的家乡享年57岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Ely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ely, a cathedral city on an island in the fens north of Cambridge, so named from Old English ǣl ‘eel’ + gē ‘district’.
English, French, and Breton (Finistère): from the Middle English, Old French personal name Elie, Hely (Elijah in the King James Bible); see Ellis and Elias .

variants.name: Ellis
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Elis, an Old French vernacular form of Elias, the Latin and New Testament Greek form of Hebrew Eliyahu; see Elijah and compare Elias , Lias , Ely .
English: possibly in some instances from the Middle English female personal name Elice, a pet form of Elizabeth .

Welsh: from Elis, a shortened form of the Welsh personal name Elisse (earlier Elisedd, a derivative of elus ‘kindly, benevolent’). As usual in Welsh, the stress in Elisse is on the penultimate syllable -li-, which shifts to initial El- when the name is shortened to Elis. It later became confused with Ellis in 1 above.

variants.name: Iley
meanings: English (Durham): habitational name from Brent Eleigh or Monks Eleigh in Suffolk, or perhaps from Illey in Worcestershire. The Suffolk placename derives from an Old English personal name Illa (genitive Illan) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The Worcestershire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hilla or Illa + lēah. Alternatively, the name may be a variant of Ely .
Perhaps an Americanized form of German   Ihle  .

variants.name: Elley
meanings: English: variant of   Ely   or   Ella  .

variants.name: Eley
meanings: German: from a vernacular form of the medieval personal name Eligius (see Eligio ), a Christian saint's name.

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Ely Sr. was born in 1635, in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Nathaniel Ely Jr, was 30 and his mother, Susanna Martha Tuffnell, was 27. He married Mary Day on 28 October 1659, in Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 17 March 1692, in his hometown, at the age of 57, and was buried in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Samuel Ely Sr. est né en 1635, à Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Nathaniel Ely Jr, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Susanna Martha Tuffnell, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mary Day le 28 octobre 1659, à Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 17 mars 1692, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Samuel Ely Sr. 1635 in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nathaniel Ely Jr 30 und seine Mutter Susanna Martha Tuffnell 27. Er hat am 28. Oktober 1659 in Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Mary Day geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 17. März 1692 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Ely Sr. è nato il nel 1635 nel Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Nathaniel Ely Jr, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Susanna Martha Tuffnell, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Mary Day il 28 ottobre 1659, nel Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 17 marzo 1692, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Ely Sr.が1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースプリングフィールドで生まれた時，父Nathaniel Ely Jrは30歳，母Susanna Martha Tuffnellは27歳であった。1659年10月28日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプデンスプリングフィールドでMary Dayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1692年3月17日に故郷で57歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースプリングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드
ko.Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드
ko.Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드
ko.Springfield, Massachusetts Bay, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드
ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Ely Sr.(이)가 1635년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nathaniel Ely Jr(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Susanna Martha Tuffnell(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1659년 10월 28일 미국 매사추세츠 주 함p든 스프링필드에서 Mary Day(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1692년 3월 17일 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Ely Sr. nasceu em 1635, em Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Nathaniel Ely Jr, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Martha Tuffnell, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Day em 28 de outubro de 1659, em Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de março de 1692, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Ely Sr. родился в 1635 г. в местности спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Nathaniel Ely Jr было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Susanna Martha Tuffnell, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Day 28 октября 1659 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампден, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 17 марта 1692 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Samuel Ely Sr. nació en 1635, en Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Nathaniel Ely Jr, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Susanna Martha Tuffnell, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Mary Day el 28 de octubre de 1659, en Springfield, Hampden, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 17 de marzo de 1692, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
